transport.environment_policy: native runtime allowlist; no provider API keys inherited

paraphrased_evidence.A: Concrete domestic examples and accessible analogies support a coherent argument, but recurring assertions, promotional assurances, and repeated promises substantially prolong the chapter.
paraphrased_evidence.B: Individual sentences retain local clarity and detail, yet their reversed, fragmentary arrangement breaks references, progression, section logic, and closure.

parsed.generic_mechanism: Ordered accumulation lets examples deepen a central claim and prepare the next step; disrupting that sequence strips sentences of context, prevents escalation, and eliminates a purposeful landing.
